rationale: The cited paper’s focus on service providers’ predecision to engage ethics consultation in hospital settings is conceptually adjacent to the citing paper’s physician predecision to use assistive AI, so it could plausibly be a theory/mechanism antecedent. However, the available evidence is only a single DOI match with no in-text citation context or explicit linkage in the citing note to this specific study. That makes it unsafe to drop, but not strong enough to clearly keep.
